changed_files.purpose: Staging deliverable per WP contract: 51 atomic normative requirements extracted from GDD V5 chapters 42-47.
Build helper that emits chunk-k.json from inline REQ records; mirrors the established _build_chunk_*.mjs pattern.
One-shot local schema verifier that re-computes every quoteHash from originalExcerpt and asserts ID/norm/category formats.

evidence: All 6 chapters (42,43,44,45,46,47) covered; contextOnly array empty
Every quoteHash is sha256 of its originalExcerpt (re-computed and matched by verifier)

Numeric constraints captured for 3 autosave slots, 20 missions, 10 heroes x 3 levels, 18 troops, 14 summons, 28/12/8/4/4 enemy tiers, 42 items, 36 relics, 30 events, 18 modifiers, 7 battle variants, 10/28/20 ascension/constellation/beyond tiers, 50 mastery, 36 achievements, 60/45 FPS, 150% text scale, 4 campaign bosses, 3x readable speed
Single write to docs/requirements/requirements/_staging/chunk-k.json (idempotent: re-running the script regenerates the same content from inline REQ records)
Build script re-runs deterministically from inline data; sha256s of artifacts are reproducible
No external state, no migrations, no destructive operations

test_results.reason: Generator emits 51 requirements and writes chunk-k.json to the staging path.
Local verifier: chapters covered 42,43,44,45,46,47; 51 requirements OK; all quoteHashes match re-computed sha256 of originalExcerpt; all enum fields valid.
Baseline 5/5 pass: complete G00 fixture passes gate validation; source hash mismatch fails; duplicate ID rejected; PASS phase report without evidence rejected; external placeholders block G43.

decisions_within_authority.decision: Use REQ-TEMP-K-NNNN IDs (temp IDs per contract) with the established kind/name/value numericConstraints shape, matching chunk-i.json style.
decisions_within_authority.rationale: Contract specifies REQ-TEMP-K-NNNN; chunk-i is the most recent comparable chunk and uses kind/name/value constraints.

decisions_within_authority.decision: Add an in-tree build script (tools/requirements/_build_chunk_k.mjs) following the _build_chunk_*.mjs pattern of all prior chunks.
decisions_within_authority.rationale: Reproducibility and parity with prior WP chunks; keeps generator in the repo for future re-emit / diff.

decisions_within_authority.decision: Add a one-shot local verifier (tools/requirements/_verify_chunk_k.mjs) that recomputes every quoteHash and asserts schema-level invariants.
decisions_within_authority.rationale: Defensive check: the staging file is not yet listed in index.json so the canonical validator skips it; the local verifier provides assurance until the staging data is later promoted to thematic files.

decisions_within_authority.decision: Switched the perf-metric verification type from 'performance' (not enumerated) to 'integration' for the chunk-44 mobile-FPS REQ.
decisions_within_authority.rationale: Validator enumerated verification types are unit|property|golden|integration|e2e|visual|native|manual|review|static; 'performance' is not allowed and would cause a hard failure later when promoted to a thematic file.

risks.description: Staging file is not listed in docs/requirements/requirements/index.json, so the canonical validator does not scan it yet. Some testIds in this chunk use the REV-* prefix; chunk-j in the same directory already does this and the gate validator ignores staging files. When this data is later promoted to thematic files, the strict test-ID regex may flag REV-* IDs unless they are remapped to GR-*/UT-*/PERF-* etc. before promotion.
risks.mitigation: The downstream consolidation WP that promotes staging -> thematic must remap REV-* IDs to a validator-accepted prefix; flagged for handover.
